name: Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the vegetables.
2. Boil the chopped vegetables until thick, approximately three hours.
3. Add 1/4 cup cornstarch and boil for an additional 15 minutes.
4. Adjust the amount of jalapeno peppers based on desired heat level and personal taste preferences.
5. Serve with brown rice or enjoy it as a standalone dish.
